name: Mary Anne's Curry Sauce (for Fondues)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Milk (or more to desired consistency)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together the night before you plan to use your fondue.
2. Refrigerate the mixture overnight to allow flavors to meld.
3. In the morning, give the sauce a stir and heat gently over low heat until warmed through.
